title: Impossibly Massive Abandoned Cathedral Carved Directly
sourceTitle: Impossibly Massive Abandoned Cathedral Carved Directly Into
prompt: An impossibly massive abandoned cathedral carved directly into the walls of a frozen arctic canyon, colossal gothic arches buried beneath ancient translucent ice layers glowing from trapped blue bioluminescence deep within the glacier, towering statues of forgotten celestial kings partially entombed in frost with cracked faces and frozen tears, enormous hanging chandeliers made from jagged crystal icicles reflecting pale moonlight across polished frozen floors, swirling snow drifting through shattered stained-glass windows depicting cosmic storms and dying stars, distant shadowy figures barely visible inside the cathedral haze, cinematic atmospheric depth, haunting silence, ultra-detailed frozen textures, dramatic volumetric lighting, hyper-realistic environmental storytelling, extreme scale, dark fantasy realism, masterpiece composition, realistic 8k --ar 2:3 --v 8.1
